subject: Gentle reminder: Invoice INV-2024-001
body:
Hi Rajesh,

I hope you’re having a great week!

I’m reaching out with a quick note regarding invoice INV-2024-001 for Rs. 45000, which was due on 08-05-2026. It looks like it might have slipped through the cracks as it's now 6 days overdue. 

If you could do me a small favor and look into this when you have a moment, I would really appreciate it. It helps us keep our records tidy! You can settle the payment directly here: https://pay.example.com/INV-2024-001

Thank you so much for your help!

Best regards,
[Your Name]

subject: Follow-up: Overdue Payment for Invoice INV-2024-002
body:
Dear Ms. Sharma,

I am writing regarding invoice INV-2024-002 for Rs. 12000, which was due on 04-05-2026. Our records show that this payment is now 10 days overdue.

We request that you settle the outstanding balance immediately via this link: https://pay.example.com/INV-2024-002. While we appreciate your business, it is important that we keep accounts current.

If the payment has already been sent, please disregard this email. Otherwise, please reply today to confirm the exact date we can expect to receive the funds.

Regards,

Accounts Department

subject: URGENT: Formal Notice of Overdue Payment - INV-2024-003
body:
Dear Mr. Verma,

This is a formal notice regarding invoice INV-2024-003 for Rs. 78500, which is now 16 days overdue from the due date of 28-04-2026. 

Despite previous reminders, the balance remains unpaid. Please be advised that this matter is now being escalated. We require you to provide a response or proof of payment within the next 48 hours to avoid further action.

You can settle the outstanding amount immediately via this link: https://pay.example.com/INV-2024-003

We expect your immediate attention to this serious matter.

Regards,

Accounts Department

status: Needs human review - no email sent
